SystemStatus.Description: System status not correct to perform test

StatusCheckFailure.Description: System status not correct to perform test

NoABSData.Description: Can not evaluate ABS results, no data was sampled

InvalidBroadcastTireSize.Description: Invalid tire size provided by broadcast

WheelForceDataReadError.Description: System error reading wheel force data array

LowSpeedSensorTestSystemCommFailure.Description: Failure reading roller speeds during low speed sensor test

HighSpeedSensorTestSystemCommFailure.Description: Failure reading roller speeds during high speed sensor test

DumpAllValvesFail.Description: Communication failure dumping all ABS valves

DumpFrontValvesFail.Description: Communication failure dumping front ABS valves

DumpRearValvesFail.Description: Communication failure dumping rear ABS valves

HoldAllValvesFail.Description: Communication failure holding all ABS valves

RecoverAllValvesFail.Description: Communication failure recovering brake force at all valves

StopRollTestModeFail.Description: Communication failure taking module out of roll test mode

SoftwareFailure.Description: Software failure detected - Please notify BEP!

UplineTestsIncomplete.Description: Upline tests not complete prior to rolls testing

TargetSpeedTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for vehicle to be in speed range

BrakeSwitchTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for brake switch to be ON

BrakeSwitchStatesNotSeen.Description: Failed to see brake switch in both ON and OFF position

StartModuleKeepAliveFail.Description: Failed to start module keep alive thread

StopModuleKeepAliveFail.Description: Failed to stop module keep alive thread

PartNumberMismatch.Description: Module part number does not match broadcast

VINMismatch.Description: Module VIN does not match broadcast

EvacAndFillIncomplete.Description: Evac and fill procedure not completed prior to rolls testing

FluidFillSwitchOn.Description: Fluid Fill Switch is ON - Check Brake fluid level\n

WheelbasePositionFault.Description: Machine wheelbase position does not match required vehicle wheelbase\n

FaultStaticParkBrake.Description: Failed Static Park Brake in Hydraulic Combo Test

LeftRearParkBrakeForceFault.Description: LR park brake force out of limits

RightRearParkBrakeForceFault.Description: RR park brake force out of limits

LowSpeedSensorTestFail.Description: Low speed wheel sensor test failed

LeftFrontLowSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: Low Speed: Left Front wheel speed sensor reading high

RightFrontLowSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: Low Speed: Right Front wheel speed sensor reading high

LeftRearLowSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: Low Speed: Left Rear wheel speed sensor reading high

RightRearLowSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: Low Speed: Right Rear wheel speed sensor reading high

LeftFrontLowSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: Low Speed: Left Front wheel speed sensor reading low

RightFrontLowSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: Low Speed: Right Front wheel speed sensor reading low

LeftRearLowSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: Low Speed: Left Rear wheel speed sensor reading low

RightRearLowSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: Low Speed: Right Rear wheel speed sensor reading low

HighSpeedSensorTestFail.Description: High speed wheel sensor test failed

LeftFrontHighSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: High Speed: Left Front wheel speed sensor reading high

RightFrontHighSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: High Speed: Right Front wheel speed sensor reading high

LeftRearHighSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: High Speed: Left Rear wheel speed sensor reading high

RightRearHighSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: High Speed: Right Rear wheel speed sensor reading high

LeftFrontHighSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: High Speed: Left Front wheel speed sensor reading low

RightFrontHighSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: High Speed: Right Front wheel speed sensor reading low

LeftRearHighSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: High Speed: Left Rear wheel speed sensor reading low

RightRearHighSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: High Speed: Right Rear wheel speed sensor reading low

NeutralCheckFault.Description: Failed to meet neutral check deceleration

LeftFrontForceFault.Description: Left Front brake force too low

RightFrontForceFault.Description: Right Front brake force too low

LeftRearForceFault.Description: Left Rear brake force too low

RightRearForceFault.Description: Right Rear brake force too low

FrontBalanceFault.Description: Front side to side brake balance out of limits

RearBalanceFault.Description: Rear side to side brake balance out of limits

FrontToRearBalanceFault.Description: Front to rear brake balance out of limits

ExcessiveBrakeForce.Description: Excessive brake force used to stop vehicle, inspect tires for damage

LeftFrontValveCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Left Front valve crossed with Right Front valve

LeftFrontValveCrossedWithRightRear.Description: Left Front valve crossed with Right Rear valve

LeftFrontValveCrossedWithLeftRear.Description: Left Front valve crossed with Left Rear valve

LeftRearValveCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Left Rear valve crossed with Left Front valve

LeftRearValveCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Left Rear valve crossed with Right Front valve

LeftRearValveCrossedWithRightRear.Description: Left Rear valve crossed with Right Rear valve

RightFrontValveCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Right Front valve crossed with Left Front valve

RightFrontValveCrossedWithRightRear.Description: Right Front valve crossed with Right Rear valve

RightFrontValveCrossedWithLeftRear.Description: Right Front valve crossed with Left Rear valve

RightRearValveCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Right Rear valve crossed with Left Front valve

RightRearValveCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Right Rear valve crossed with Right Front valve

RightRearValveCrossedWithLeftRear.Description: Right Rear valve crossed with Left Rear valve

LeftFrontSensorCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Left Front wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Front

LeftFrontSensorCrossedWithLeftRear.Description: Left Front wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Rear

LeftFrontSensorCrossedWithRightRear.Description: Left Front wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Rear

LeftRearSensorCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Left Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Front

LeftRearSensorCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Left Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Front

LeftRearSensorCrossedWithRightRear.Description: Left Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Rear

RightFrontSensorCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Right Front wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Front

RightFrontSensorCrossedWithLeftRear.Description: Right Front wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Rear

RightFrontSensorCrossedWithRightRear.Description: Right Front wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Rear

RightRearSensorCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Right Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Front

RightRearSensorCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Right Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Front

RightRearSensorCrossedWithLeftRear.Description: Right Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Rear

RearSensorCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Front

RearSensorCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Front

AWDSpeedBalanceBrakeSwitch.Description: Brakes applied during AWD Axle Speed Test

AxleRatioPercentFault.Description: Axle ratio percent out of limits

DTC_500A.Description: Left Front Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit

DTC_5011.Description: Left Front Wheel Speed Sensor Signal Erratic Performance

DTC_5014.Description: Left Front Wheel Speed Comparative Performance

DTC_5015.Description: Right Front Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit

DTC_501C.Description: Right Front Wheel Speed Sensor Signal Erratic Performance

DTC_501F.Description: Right Front Wheel Speed Comparative Performance

DTC_5020.Description: Left Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit

DTC_5027.Description: Left Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Signal Erratic Performance

DTC_502A.Description: Left Rear Wheel Speed Comparative Performance

DTC_502B.Description: Right Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit

DTC_5032.Description: Right Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Signal Erratic Performance

DTC_5035.Description: Right Rear Wheel Speed Comparative Performance

DTC_5046.Description: Left Front Wheel Pressure Phase Monitoring

DTC_5047.Description: Right Front Wheel Pressure Phase Monitoring

DTC_5048.Description: Left Rear Wheel Pressure Phase Monitoring

DTC_5049.Description: Right Rear Wheel Pressure Phase Monitoring

DTC_5221.Description: Brake Pressure Sensor/Accelerator Pedal Position Sensor Correlation

DTC_5227.Description: Brake Booster Travel Position Sensor Circuit Performance

DTC_5228.Description: Brake Booster Travel Position Sensor Circuit Low

DTC_5229.Description: Brake Booster Travel Position Sensor Circuit High

DTC_522A.Description: Brake Booster Pedal Force Switch Circuit

DTC_522B.Description: Brake Booster Pedal Force Switch Circuit Performance

DTC_522C.Description: Active Brake Booster Control Circuit Supply Voltage

DTC_6114.Description: ESP Sensor Cluster Supply Voltage Low

DTC_6115.Description: ESP Sensor Cluster Supply Voltage High

DTC_6116.Description: ABS Pump Motor Supply Low Voltage

DTC_C114.Description: Lost Communication With Final Drive Control Module

DTC_C125.Description: Lost Communication With ESP Sensor Cluster

DTC_C126.Description: Lost Communication With Steering Angle Sensor Module

DTC_C141.Description: Lost Communication With Front Control Module

DTC_D501.Description: Implausible Message Data Length Received from ECM/PCM

DTC_D502.Description: Implausible Message Data Length Received from TCM

DTC_D503.Description: Implausible Message Data Length Received from FCM

DTC_D504.Description: Implausible Message Data Length Received from Steering Angle Sensor Module

Code_0019.Description: Speed Control Primary Set Speed Time

Code_0020.Description: Speed Control Brake Application Speed ABS Reduction

Code_0021.Description: Speed Control Secondary Set Speed Time (Resume)

Code_0023.Description: Speed Control Coast Button Speed ABS Reduction

Code_0024.Description: Speed Control Secondary Set Speed Time

Code_0026.Description: Speed Control Clutch Application Speed ABS Reduction

Code_0027.Description: Speed Control Switch Off Speed ABS Reduction

Code_0037.Description: Service Brake Applied During Park Pawl Test

Code_0038.Description: Service Brake Applied During Park Brake Test

Code_0040.Description: 4x4 Front Shaft Sensor Not Equal to Roll Speed

Code_0041.Description: 4x4 Rear Shaft Sensor Not Equal to Roll Speed

Code_0042.Description: 4x4 Front Shaft Speed Not Equal to Rear Shaft Speed

Code_0048.Description: Speed Control Traction Condition Speed ABS Reduction

Code_0060.Description: ABS Sensor Cross ? Front to Rear Axle

Code_0062.Description: Traction Control Potentiometer ? Pedal Fully Depressed

Code_0065.Description: ABS Left Front Sensor Speed Did Not Match Roller Speed (At Low Speed)

Code_0066.Description: ABS Right Front Sensor Speed Did Not Match Roller Speed (At Low Speed)

Code_0067.Description: ABS Left Rear Sensor Speed Did Not Match Roller Speed (At Low Speed)

Code_0068.Description: ABS Right Rear Sensor Speed Did Not Match Roller Speed (At Low Speed)

Code_0069.Description: ABS Communication Fault (After Communications Had Been Established)

Code_0072.Description: ABS Ignition Did Not Cycle Off

Code_0073.Description: ABS Ignition Did Not Cycle On

Code_0075.Description: ABS Brake Switch Active With No Brake Applied

Code_0076.Description: ABS Brake Switch Inactive With Brake Applied

Code_0079.Description: ABS Pump Motor 'On' State Not Detected by Anti-lock Module

Code_0080.Description: RWABS Driver Influence (Driver Let Off Brake During Brake Test)

Code_0082.Description: RWABS Sensor: Peaks Accumulate Too Fast ? Noisy Signal

Code_0083.Description: RWABS Sensor: Too Many Peaks Detected ? Noisy Signal

Code_0084.Description: RWABS Sensor: Too Few Peaks Detected ? No Signal

Code_0085.Description: RWABS Sensor: Positive Peak Sensor Voltage Too Large (Vehicle Tested At Too High A Speed)

Code_0086.Description: RWABS (Sensor: Negative Peak Sensor Voltage Too Large (Vehicle Tested At Too High A Speed)

Code_0087.Description: RWABS Sensor: Positive Peak At Offset ? Bad Tooth

Code_0088.Description: RWABS Sensor: Negative Peak At Offset ? Bad Tooth

Code_0089.Description: RWABS Sensor: Peak Wrong Side Of Offset ? Bad Tooth

Code_0092.Description: RWABS Sensor: Peak Deviation Error ? Bad Tooth

Code_0095.Description: RWABS Sensor: Peak?To?Peak Voltage Too Low

Code_0100.Description: ABS Right Rear (Or Rear) Inlet Valve

Code_0104.Description: ABS Right Rear (Or Rear) Outlet Valve

Code_0105.Description: ABS Traction Assist Left (Or Single) Valve

Code_0107.Description: ABS Traction Assist Left Build Force

Code_0108.Description: ABS Traction Assist Right Build Force

Code_0109.Description: ABS Traction Assist Left ABS Reduction Force

Code_0110.Description: ABS Traction Assist Right ABS Reduction Force

Code_0112.Description: No Acceleration During Torque ABS Reduction Test

Code_0113.Description: ABS Left Front Sensor Speed Did Not Match Roller Speed (At High Speed)

Code_0114.Description: ABS Right Front Sensor Speed Did Not Match Roller Speed (At High Speed)

Code_0115.Description: ABS Left Rear Sensor Speed Did Not Match Roller Speed (At High Speed)

Code_0116.Description: ABS Right Rear Sensor Speed Did Not Match Roller Speed (At High Speed)

Code_0119.Description: Gem Speed Sensor Not Equal To Roll Speed

Code_0122.Description: Gem Communications Fault (Failed After Initial Communications)

Code_0161.Description: abs valve cross lf to rf

Code_0162.Description: abs valve cross lr to rr

Code_0163.Description: abs valve cross front to rear
